extraction_notes: Complete extraction from all 113 pages. All vague names replaced with actual U-designators from schematic.

ics.description: Main System on Chip. BGA with PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine, memory controller, I/O

ics.function: SVR AON — 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: 30A ICC MAX multi-phase buck producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. Main power IC feeding both PMUs. Phase drivers on page 31
Slave Power Management Unit. Bucks: 3,5,6,8,10,12,13,14. LDOs: 4,5,6,9,9B,12,15,17,18. Switches: SW4-7. Input: PP3V8_AON
Master Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0,1,2,3,4,7,9,11,13. LDOs: 1-3,5,7-11,13,14,19,20,INT. 32K clock, charger reset. Input: PP3V8_AON (VODMAN)
Main charger IC converting USB-C/MagSafe input to PPBUS_AON and managing battery charging. Exact part number not legible at schematic resolution
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.15V) from PPBUS_AON. F=1.1MHz. NOT U6300 — confirmed UC300 from power aliases page 94
Produces PP3V3_S2 from PPBUS_AON

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Port controller for ATC0 (left rear). PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control. Internal LDO (PP1V05_UPC0_LDO_CORE). SPI ROM for firmware

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Port controller for ATC1 (left front). Same as UF400 for second port
EUSB signal repeater between ports and SoC. Powered by PP3V25_S2_100
Sequencing: 3.3V must come up at same time or before system 1.2V/1.8V
Monitors PP3V8_AON current via PPVAON_ISNS_P/N
Generates CHGR_RST_2N_R → UPC_PMU_RESET_DLO
Ceres SE. Powered by VDDPL1_SE, PP3V8_AON. I2C interface
SEP EEPROM IC. I2C address 0x71 (TS111_0001). Powered by PP1V8_MAME, PP1V25_MAME_3D
Display power management IC. Outputs: PP1V05_DISP, PP_AVDD_DISP, PP_VGH_DISP, PP_VGL_DISP. I2C address 0x74. TI or Intersil BOM options
Boost converter for LCD backlight LED strings. Input: PPBUS_AONSW_LCD
Sequences display panel power rails (POWER2, POWER3)
5A current limit. Switches PPBUS_AON → PPBUS_AONSW_LCD for backlight. EN = MPMU GPIO6L
Lid angle sensor disable logic. Powered by PP1V8_AON, PP3V3_AWPEK_DIIS
Level shifts camera reset signal. Powered by PP1V25_S2, PP3V_S2
Ferrite bead filter: PP3V_S2 → PP3V_S2_CAMERA_FILT
Integrated WiFi/BT with 2GFEM + 5GFEM front-ends (CL005-CL013). Powered by VBAT, PP3V8_AON_WLBT, PP1V25_S2
First NAND package. Powered by PPVDS_MAME_NAND_VCC, PP1V25_MAME_NAND_VCC2. FL4000 fuse
Second NAND package. Same power as S5E0. FL4001 fuse
Battery flex connector. SYS_DETECT circuit with D5130/D5131, R5140, C5150
MagSafe connector with Q5401 MOSFET pair (2x7120892018029). Mates with APN: 516S00788
Controls MagSafe charging. SPI ROM, configured as LPCD. Fused power via F5601. U-designator in UPC5 numbering range but exact U-number not legible on page 28
Motion sensor. Powered by PP1V8_S2. SPI interface
